analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete black hole-themed implementations. The test-website appears to be the main development target. Current files show partial implementation of a dark cosmic theme with black hole visuals, but lack complete animations, interactive elements, and cohesive design. The event.json specifies a black hole topic with animated objects, slides, and pages. Key missing elements include: comprehensive black hole animations, interactive slide functionality, cosmic particle effects, and a fully realized dark space theme.

improvements.description: Add animated black hole sections with swirling effects, interactive planet orbits, and cosmic particle backgrounds. Include slide navigation with smooth transitions and hover effects for cosmic elements.

Implement dark cosmic theme with CSS animations for black hole gravitational effects, swirling particle backgrounds, glowing elements, and smooth transitions. Add keyframe animations for rotating planets and pulsing black hole cores.

Create interactive slide functionality with automatic transitions, manual navigation controls, and particle system animations. Implement black hole gravitational pull effects on page elements and cosmic object interactions.
